citations: Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.

memory_cards.statement: As of this conversation, Sam had left Goldman the previous month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans, but lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam is open to catching up with Daniele about AI infrastructure.
